_publications._publicationTitle: Unmasking Intra-tumoral Heterogeneity and Clonal Evolution in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: Finally, SIFT and Polyphen were used to predict pathogenicity. Table 3 a,b list the somatic variants in the coding region that may play a role in the pathogenesis
details: Used to predict pathogenicity of somatic variants in coding regions that may play a role in tumor pathogenesis
